text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've heard about "pulling out all the<n>stops," and
now I understand what it<n>means.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll run turf, dirt—whatever it takes to<n>see my
Umas shining up close and<n>personal!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If it's for my oshis, I'll gladly line up in<n>the
freezing cold to buy merch or get up<n>at the break
of dawn in the summer heat!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huehehe! No battleground is too<n>harrowing when
it comes to my Umas!<n>Facing hardship only makes
a hero<n>stronger!
